name: AI COO — Broadcast Campaign Trigger

trigger.description: Triggered manually from GHL or via webhook from n8n Growth Department workflow

config.description: Only send to leads, never to active clients or unsubscribes

config.subject: {{BROADCAST_SUBJECT_VARIANT}}
config.note: Use a different subject line for the unopened resend — same body is fine

notes: Use sparingly — 1-2 broadcasts per month max to avoid list fatigue. The 48-hour resend with different subject line typically recovers 20-30% more opens. Replace BROADCAST_SUBJECT and BROADCAST_TEMPLATE with the specific campaign before triggering.
